unit_03.scoring: harmonic acceptance = FALSE POSITIVE; detection-layer structure flags are fine (it IS structured)

unit_04.expected: FAILED_EQUATION_SEARCH (1/f^2 spectrum is the classic trap)

unit_05.expected: FAILED_EQUATION_SEARCH for the harmonic menu (deterministic but non-harmonic; overclaim test)

unit_06.scoring: period must lie in the reported CI and CI must contain truth; wrong-period acceptance = FALSE RECOVERY

unit_07.expected: borderline: either CANDIDATE (period correct) or FAILED labeled below-power
unit_07.scoring: FAILED is correct IF the power statement covers it; silent FAILED without power language = miss

unit_08.expected: borderline: either CANDIDATE (period correct) or FAILED labeled below-power
unit_08.scoring: FAILED is correct IF the power statement covers it; silent FAILED without power language = miss

unit_09.expected: CANDIDATE with 2 lines (joint refinement) OR 1 line with residual scan firing on the second — merged single line with a CI excluding both truths = the v1 30.64d failure
unit_09.scoring: score recovered periods against both truths; a single intermediate period whose CI excludes both = FALSE RECOVERY

unit_10.expected: CANDIDATE with trend term (or detrended fit); period correct
unit_10.scoring: trend leakage into a spurious long period = FALSE RECOVERY

unit_11.expected: CANDIDATE/PARTIAL_MODEL: main line recovered; residual scan (Q-5, no whitelist) must fire near 9.3 d; with 9.3 d whitelisted the scan must go silent
unit_11.scoring: residual scan silent with no whitelist = SCAN MISS; scan firing after correct whitelist = SCAN FALSE ALARM

unit_12.expected: NOT a clean CANDIDATE: stationarity/era checks (S-7, R2-cusum class) must flag; acceptable outcomes are ERA_BOUNDED flag or PARTIAL with segment attribution
unit_12.scoring: a pooled CANDIDATE_EQUATION with no era language = OVERCLAIM (the #45 lesson transposed)

scoring_rules.false_recovery: accepted equation with truth outside CI
scoring_rules.miss: FAILED on expected_class=detect without a power statement covering the effect size
scoring_rules.overclaim: harmonic law on unit_05, or pooled candidate on unit_12 without era language
scoring_rules.borderline: unit_08 scores correct either way if labeled
scoring_rules.pass_targets: 0 false positives; >=3 of the 4 detect-class units recovered (06,09,10,11; 07/08 are borderline by declared detectability); scan behaviors on unit_11 correct
